settings.review_text: A total lifesaver for painting my truck's undercarriage! The handle makes the spray so much easier to control, and my fingers didn't ache at all.
I use this for all my craft projects now. It's so much easier and the finish comes out way more even. Absolutely love it!
Best $15 I ever spent. I painted three rooms of furniture last weekend and my hand felt great the whole time. Genius product.
